author: re-xyr
text: MeshFor loop variable does not have a type

author: re-xyr
text:
There isn't a type for the `loop_var` for mesh for loops, while for any other kind of loops that type is `i32`: <https://github.com/taichi-dev/taichi/blob/master/taichi/ir/frontend_ir.cpp#L38-L116>

What is the type of `loop_var` in mesh loops?
